name: SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA GAS CO
summary: Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) is a regulated natural gas distribution utility serving customers in Southern California. It operates natural gas transmission, distribution, and storage infrastructure, providing natural gas delivery services to residential, commercial, and industrial customers. SoCalGas is a subsidiary of Sempra Energy and is subject to regulation by the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) and other state and federal regulatory bodies.

products.name: Natural Gas Distribution
products.description: Regulated delivery of natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers in Southern California.

products.name: Natural Gas Storage
products.description: Operation of natural gas storage facilities to manage supply and meet customer demand.

products.name: Natural Gas Transmission
products.description: Transportation of natural gas through transmission pipeline infrastructure across Southern California.
